overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing vehicle driving through Night City during golden hour sunset. The journey transitions from elevated highways through shadowy underpasses and dense neon-lit urban canyons, ending with navigation through a busy pedestrian intersection. The scene features futuristic architecture, holographic billboards, and dynamic lighting mixing natural sunset with artificial neon.

events.description: descending from elevated highway into shadow of massive concrete overpass structure
entering deep shadow under large overpass, visibility temporarily reduced

agents.ego_description: driving a vehicle down an elevated roadway and entering the shadow of a massive overpass system with stadium structure visible

entered.detail: tall futuristic glass and steel skyscraper dominating the skyline ahead
massive concrete highway overpass with thick support pillars
large angular stadium structure with tiered seating visible

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated highway with a clear view of futuristic skyscrapers in the distance. The vehicle drives toward and enters a massive concrete overpass system, transitioning from bright golden hour sunlight into deep shadow. A large stadium structure is visible to the right as the road descends slightly.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass system transitioning to elevated ramp

events.description: pedestrian in white clothing runs across the road from right to left in front of the vehicle
exiting underpass into direct golden hour sunlight on elevated ramp
entering enclosed tunnel-like structure between buildings

agents.ego_description: navigating through underpasses and up an elevated ramp, passing a running pedestrian before entering a tunnel

notable_agents.action: character in white clothing sprinting across the street from right to left

entered.detail: dark tunnel entrance between concrete structures ahead
large illuminated billboard advertising All Foods with green and red graphics
body of water visible between buildings on the right side

segments.scene_description: Driving through the underpass system, a pedestrian suddenly runs across the road. The vehicle emerges from shadow onto a sunlit elevated ramp with billboards and a water canal visible, then approaches and enters a tunnel entrance between buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with overhead walkways and holographic advertisements

events.description: passing under metal pedestrian overpass with neon advertisements becoming prominent
slowing down as vehicle approaches busy intersection with crossing pedestrians ahead

agents.ego_description: driving through a narrow street canyon lined with towering buildings, neon billboards, and holographic advertisements, approaching a major intersection

entered.detail: metal walkway bridge connecting buildings overhead with railings
large floating holographic advertisement displaying animated anime character
massive skyscraper with illuminated red signage dominating the end of the street
large screen displaying SET YOUR SOUL FREE advertisement with purple background

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels through a dense urban canyon with buildings towering on both sides. Overhead pedestrian bridges and massive holographic billboards create a canopy of neon and metal. The mega corporate tower looms ahead at the end of the street as the vehicle slows approaching a busy intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with pedestrian crosswalks and digital advertising towers

events.description: stopping at red light to allow pedestrians to cross the intersection
proceeding through intersection as traffic light changes and pedestrians finish crossing
executing right turn at intersection onto new street

agents.ego_description: stopped at a red light watching crowds of pedestrians cross the wide intersection, then proceeding and turning right

notable_agents.action: black car driving ahead through the intersection

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with white striped lines spanning the multi-lane road
massive digital screen displaying animated character in red hat against green background
suspended traffic light showing red signal above the intersection

segments.scene_description: The vehicle stops at a major intersection filled with crossing pedestrians. A massive green digital billboard dominates the right side of the view. After waiting for the light to change, the vehicle proceeds through the crosswalk and executes a right turn, with the mega tower now visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with storefronts and neon signage

events.description: completing right turn and accelerating down new commercial street

agents.ego_description: driving down a commercial street lined with shops and neon signs after turning right at the intersection

entered.detail: multi-story building with ground floor shops and upper level windows
various illuminated business signs attached to building facades
suspended traffic signals spanning the width of the street ahead

segments.scene_description: After completing the right turn, the vehicle accelerates down a new commercial street. The road is flanked by buildings with neon storefront signs and overhead traffic lights. The scene continues the dense urban environment with moderate vehicle traffic ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from a sun-drenched elevated highway into the dense, neon-lit depths of a futuristic urban core. It begins under the bright glow of golden hour, moving toward a massive concrete overpass that plunges the vehicle from open sunlight into deep shadow past a large stadium. As the camera emerges from the underpass onto a sunlit ramp overlooking a water canal, it quickly transitions into a narrow urban canyon where towering buildings and holographic billboards create a canopy of artificial light. The scene then slows as the vehicle reaches a busy intersection dominated by a massive green digital billboard and a looming corporate tower, pausing for crossing pedestrians before executing a right turn. Finally, the vehicle accelerates down a commercial street flanked by neon storefronts and overhead traffic lights, disappearing further into the crowded city traffic.
